title: Quantum Task
description: A quantum task submitted to an Amazon Braket device (QPU or simulator)

deviceArn.description: ARN of the quantum device the task is submitted to

shots.description: Number of times the circuit is executed

outputS3Bucket.description: S3 bucket for task result output

outputS3KeyPrefix.description: S3 key prefix for task result output

status.description: Current status of the quantum task

failureReason.description: Reason for task failure if status is FAILED

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created

tags.description: Metadata tags for the quantum task
